1	/**
2	 * Transaction Refund Endpoint
3	 *
4	 * POST /api/admin/transactions/{id}/refund
5	 * Admin-only — calls refundStripe or refundPayPal and updates status to 'refunded'
6	 *
7	 * @fileType api-route
8	 * @domain payments
9	 */
10	
11	import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
12	import { getPayload } from 'payload'
13	
14	import config from '@payload-config'
15	import type { Transaction } from '@/payload-types'
16	import { refundStripe } from '@/lib/payment/stripe'
17	import { refundPayPal } from '@/lib/payment/paypal'
18	import { AccountRole } from '@/server/payload/collections/Users/roles'
19	
20	interface RouteParams {
21	  params: Promise<{ id: string }>
22	}
23	
24	export async function POST(req: NextRequest, { params }: RouteParams) {
25	  const { id } = await params
26	  const payload = await getPayload({ config })
27	
28	  // 1. Authenticate
29	  const authResult = await payload.auth({ headers: req.headers })
30	  if (!authResult.user) {
31	    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, { status: 401 })
32	  }
33	
34	  // 2. Check admin role
35	  if (
36	    !('collection' in authResult.user) ||
37	    authResult.user.collection !== 'users' ||
38	    authResult.user.role !== AccountRole.Admin
39	  ) {
40	    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Forbidden' }, { status: 403 })
41	  }
42	
43	  // 3. Fetch transaction
44	<<<<<<< HEAD
45	  let transaction: Transaction | undefined
46	=======
47	  let transaction: Record<string, unknown> | null = null
48	>>>>>>> origin/dev
49	  try {
50	    transaction = (await payload.findByID({
51	      collection: 'transactions',
52	      id,
53	      depth: 0,
54	      overrideAccess: true,
55	<<<<<<< HEAD
56	    })) as Transaction
57	  } catch (err: unknown) {
58	    const error = err as { status?: number; isOperational?: boolean }
59	    if (error?.status === 404 || error?.isOperational) {
60	      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Transaction not found' }, { status: 404 })
61	    }
62	    throw err
63	=======
64	    })) as unknown as Record<string, unknown> | null
65	  } catch (err) {
66	    if (err instanceof Error && (err.name === 'NotFound' || err.message.includes('Not Found'))) {
67	      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Transaction not found' }, { status: 404 })
68	    }
69	    throw err
70	  }
71	
72	  if (!transaction) {
73	    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Transaction not found' }, { status: 404 })
74	>>>>>>> origin/dev
75	  }
76	
77	  // 4. Validate status — double-refund guard
78	  if (transaction!.status === 'refunded') {
79	    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'העסקה כבר הוחזרה' }, { status: 400 })
80	  }
81	
82	  if (transaction!.status !== 'succeeded') {
83	    return NextResponse.json(
84	      { error: 'Only succeeded transactions can be refunded' },
85	      { status: 400 },
86	    )
87	  }
88	
89	  // 5. Call provider refund
90	  const { provider, providerTransactionId, amount } = transaction as {
91	    provider: 'stripe' | 'paypal'
92	    providerTransactionId: string
93	    amount: number
94	  }
95	
96	  try {
97	    if (provider === 'stripe') {
98	      await refundStripe(providerTransactionId, amount)
99	    } else if (provider === 'paypal') {
100	      await refundPayPal(providerTransactionId, amount)
101	    } else {
102	      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unknown payment provider' }, { status: 400 })
103	    }
104	  } catch (err) {
105	    payload.logger.error({ error: err, transactionId: id, provider }, 'Refund operation failed')
106	    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Refund operation failed' }, { status: 500 })
107	  }
108	
109	  // 6. Update status to refunded
110	  await payload.update({
111	    collection: 'transactions',
112	    id,
113	    data: { status: 'refunded' },
114	    overrideAccess: true,
115	  })
116	
117	  return NextResponse.json({ success: true })
118	}
119

content.content:
1	/**
2	 * Transaction Refund Endpoint
3	 *
4	 * POST /api/admin/transactions/{id}/refund
5	 * Admin-only — calls refundStripe or refundPayPal and updates status to 'refunded'
6	 *
7	 * @fileType api-route
8	 * @domain payments
9	 */
10	
11	import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
12	import { getPayload } from 'payload'
13	
14	import config from '@payload-config'
15	import type { Transaction } from '@/payload-types'
16	import { refundStripe } from '@/lib/payment/stripe'
17	import { refundPayPal } from '@/lib/payment/paypal'
18	import { AccountRole } from '@/server/payload/collections/Users/roles'
19	
20	interface RouteParams {
21	  params: Promise<{ id: string }>
22	}
23	
24	export async function POST(req: NextRequest, { params }: RouteParams) {
25	  const { id } = await params
26	  const payload = await getPayload({ config })
27	
28	  // 1. Authenticate
29	  const authResult = await payload.auth({ headers: req.headers })
30	  if (!authResult.user) {
31	    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unauthorized' }, { status: 401 })
32	  }
33	
34	  // 2. Check admin role
35	  if (
36	    !('collection' in authResult.user) ||
37	    authResult.user.collection !== 'users' ||
38	    authResult.user.role !== AccountRole.Admin
39	  ) {
40	    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Forbidden' }, { status: 403 })
41	  }
42	
43	  // 3. Fetch transaction
44	  let transaction: Transaction | null = null
45	  try {
46	    transaction = (await payload.findByID({
47	      collection: 'transactions',
48	      id,
49	      depth: 0,
50	      overrideAccess: true,
51	    })) as Transaction
52	  } catch (err) {
53	    // Handle both operational errors and not-found errors
54	    if (err instanceof Error && (err.name === 'NotFound' || err.message.includes('Not Found'))) {
55	      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Transaction not found' }, { status: 404 })
56	    }
57	    throw err
58	  }
59	
60	  if (!transaction) {
61	    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Transaction not found' }, { status: 404 })
62	  }
63	
64	  // 4. Validate status — double-refund guard
65	  if (transaction.status === 'refunded') {
66	    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'העסקה כבר הוחזרה' }, { status: 400 })
67	  }
68	
69	  if (transaction.status !== 'succeeded') {
70	    return NextResponse.json(
71	      { error: 'Only succeeded transactions can be refunded' },
72	      { status: 400 },
73	    )
74	  }
75	
76	  // 5. Call provider refund
77	  const { provider, providerTransactionId, amount } = transaction as {
78	    provider: 'stripe' | 'paypal'
79	    providerTransactionId: string
80	    amount: number
81	  }
82	
83	  try {
84	    if (provider === 'stripe') {
85	      await refundStripe(providerTransactionId, amount)
86	    } else if (provider === 'paypal') {
87	      await refundPayPal(providerTransactionId, amount)
88	    } else {
89	      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Unknown payment provider' }, { status: 400 })
90	    }
91	  } catch (err) {
92	    payload.logger.error({ error: err, transactionId: id, provider }, 'Refund operation failed')
93	    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Refund operation failed' }, { status: 500 })
94	  }
95	
96	  // 6. Update status to refunded
97	  await payload.update({
98	    collection: 'transactions',
99	    id,
100	    data: { status: 'refunded' },
101	    overrideAccess: true,
102	  })
103	
104	  return NextResponse.json({ success: true })
105	}
106
